name: grok

smoke: Run this exact shell command: printf ZENTTY_AGENT_BENCH_OK
tasks: Use your todo_write tool to create a todo list with these exact tasks: 1. Review directory, 2. Identify main language, 3. Suggest one improvement. Mark task 1 done. Then run: printf ZENTTY_AGENT_BENCH_TASKS_OK
approval: Use your ask_user_question tool to ask me one short question, then answer it yourself after I reply.

approval.match: Trust|Workspace|trust this|approve|permission|Allow|Do you want|Command to approve|Yes, allow|Action Required|ask_user_question|AskUserQuestion|AskUser|question|needs? input
approval.label: approve-or-answer-question

skip_patterns: not running in a trusted directory
